units.source_text: 1 預期信貸損失總額在金融資產的損失準備確認，但若預期信貸損失總額超過金融資產的賬面總值，則預期信貸損失會確認為準備。
units.translation_target_text: 1 The total expected credit losses are recognized in the loss provision of financial assets, but if the total expected credit losses exceed the total book value of the financial assets, the expected credit losses will be recognized as provisions.
units.translation_en: 1 The total expected credit losses are recognized in the loss provision of financial assets, but if the total expected credit losses exceed the total book value of the financial assets, the expected credit losses will be recognized as provisions.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 1 The total expected credit losses are recognized in the loss provision of financial assets, but if the total expected credit losses exceed the total book value of the financial assets, the expected credit losses will be recognized as provisions.

units.source_text: 2 於2025年12月31日，賬面總值包括客戶及同業貸款36億美元（2024年12月31日︰11億美元）及按已攤銷成本計量之其他金融資產5億美元（2024年12月31日︰21億美元），當中包括：計劃出售烏拉圭業務（14億美元）、德國私人銀行業務
units.translation_target_text: 2 As of December 31, 2025, the total book value includes US$3.6 billion in customer and interbank loans (US$1.1 billion as of December 31, 2024) and US$500 million in other financial assets measured at amortized cost (US$2.1 billion as of December 31, 2024), including: the planned sale of the Uruguay business (US$1.4 billion), the German private banking business
units.translation_en: 2 As of December 31, 2025, the total book value includes US$3.6 billion in customer and interbank loans (US$1.1 billion as of December 31, 2024) and US$500 million in other financial assets measured at amortized cost (US$2.1 billion as of December 31, 2024), including: the planned sale of the Uruguay business (US$1.4 billion), the German private banking business

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 2 As of December 31, 2025, the total book value includes US$3.6 billion in customer and interbank loans (US$1.1 billion as of December 31, 2024) and US$500 million in other financial assets measured at amortized cost (US$2.1 billion as of December 31, 2024), including: the planned sale of the Uruguay business (US$1.4 billion), the German private banking business

units.source_text: 及託管業務（3億美元，2024年12月31日：22億美元）、南非業務（4億美元，2024年12月31日：4億美元），以及出售美國個別資產（13億美元，2024年12月31日：1,100萬美元）。相關預期信貸損失準備包括客戶及同業貸款2,700萬美元
units.translation_target_text: and custody operations (US$300 million, December 31, 2024: US$2.2 billion), South African operations (US$400 million, December 31, 2024: US$400 million), and the sale of individual U.S. assets (US$1.3 billion, December 31, 2024: US$11 million). Related expected credit loss provisions include US$27 million in loans to customers and peers
units.translation_en: and custody operations (US$300 million, December 31, 2024: US$2.2 billion), South African operations (US$400 million, December 31, 2024: US$400 million), and the sale of individual U.S. assets (US$1.3 billion, December 31, 2024: US$11 million). Related expected credit loss provisions include US$27 million in loans to customers and peers

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: and custody operations (US$300 million, December 31, 2024: US$2.2 billion), South African operations (US$400 million, December 31, 2024: US$400 million), and the sale of individual U.S. assets (US$1.3 billion, December 31, 2024: US$11 million). Related expected credit loss provisions include US$27 million in loans to customers and peers

units.source_text: （2024年12月31日：400萬美元）及按已攤銷成本計量之其他金融資產零美元（2024年12月31日：30萬美元）。
units.translation_target_text: (December 31, 2024: US$4 million) and other financial assets measured at amortized cost of US$0 (December 31, 2024: US$0.3 million).
units.translation_en: (December 31, 2024: US$4 million) and other financial assets measured at amortized cost of US$0 (December 31, 2024: US$0.3 million).

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: (December 31, 2024: US$4 million) and other financial assets measured at amortized cost of US$0 (December 31, 2024: US$0.3 million).

units.source_text: 3 僅包括IFRS 9減值規定適用的金融工具。第72頁綜合資產負債表中所載的「預付款項、應計收益及其他資產」由金融和非金融資產組成，包括現金抵押品、結算賬項及從其他銀行收款過程收取的項目。
units.translation_target_text: 3 Includes only financial instruments to which the impairment requirements of IFRS 9 apply. "Prepayments, accruals and other assets" included in the consolidated balance sheet on page 72 consists of financial and non-financial assets, including cash collateral, settlement accounts and items received from other banks in the collection process.
units.translation_en: 3 Includes only financial instruments to which the impairment requirements of IFRS 9 apply. "Prepayments, accruals and other assets" included in the consolidated balance sheet on page 72 consists of financial and non-financial assets, including cash collateral, settlement accounts and items received from other banks in the collection process.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 3 Includes only financial instruments to which the impairment requirements of IFRS 9 apply. "Prepayments, accruals and other assets" included in the consolidated balance sheet on page 72 consists of financial and non-financial assets, including cash collateral, settlement accounts and items received from other banks in the collection process.

units.source_text: 4 指約定金額被悉數取用而客戶又拖欠還款時涉及之最大風險額。
units.translation_target_text: 4 refers to the maximum risk involved when the agreed amount is fully withdrawn and the customer defaults on repayment.
units.translation_en: 4 refers to the maximum risk involved when the agreed amount is fully withdrawn and the customer defaults on repayment.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 4 refers to the maximum risk involved when the agreed amount is fully withdrawn and the customer defaults on repayment.

units.source_text: 5 按公允值計入其他全面收益之債務工具繼續按公允值計量，預期信貸損失準備列作備忘項目。預期信貸損失的變動於收益表內「預期信貸損失及其他信貸減值準備變動」項下確認。
units.translation_target_text: 5 Debt instruments at fair value included in other comprehensive income continue to be measured at fair value, and the provision for expected credit losses is listed as a memorandum item. Changes in expected credit losses are recognized in the income statement under “Changes in expected credit losses and other credit impairment provisions”.
units.translation_en: 5 Debt instruments at fair value included in other comprehensive income continue to be measured at fair value, and the provision for expected credit losses is listed as a memorandum item. Changes in expected credit losses are recognized in the income statement under “Changes in expected credit losses and other credit impairment provisions”.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 5 Debt instruments at fair value included in other comprehensive income continue to be measured at fair value, and the provision for expected credit losses is listed as a memorandum item. Changes in expected credit losses are recognized in the income statement under “Changes in expected credit losses and other credit impairment provisions”.

units.source_text: 下表載列按級別及行業劃分的集團信貸風險概覽，以及相關的預期信貸損失覆蓋。於各級別入賬的金融資產具有以下特點：
units.translation_target_text: The table below sets out an overview of the Group's credit risk by grade and industry, and the associated expected credit loss coverage. Financial assets recorded at each level have the following characteristics:
units.translation_en: The table below sets out an overview of the Group's credit risk by grade and industry, and the associated expected credit loss coverage. Financial assets recorded at each level have the following characteristics:

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The table below sets out an overview of the Group's credit risk by grade and industry, and the associated expected credit loss coverage. Financial assets recorded at each level have the following characteristics:

units.source_text: 第一級︰此類金融資產未減值，且信貸風險並無大幅增加，當中已確認12個月預期信貸損失準備。
units.translation_target_text: Level 1: This type of financial assets is not impaired, and the credit risk has not increased significantly, and a 12-month expected credit loss provision has been recognized.
units.translation_en: Level 1: This type of financial assets is not impaired, and the credit risk has not increased significantly, and a 12-month expected credit loss provision has been recognized.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Level 1: This type of financial assets is not impaired, and the credit risk has not increased significantly, and a 12-month expected credit loss provision has been recognized.

units.source_text: 第二級︰此類金融資產在首次確認入賬後信貸風險大幅增加，當中已確認期限內預期信貸損失。
units.translation_target_text: Level 2. The credit risk of such financial assets has increased significantly after the first recognition and accounting, and expected credit losses within the period have been recognized.
units.translation_en: Level 2. The credit risk of such financial assets has increased significantly after the first recognition and accounting, and expected credit losses within the period have been recognized.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Level 2. The credit risk of such financial assets has increased significantly after the first recognition and accounting, and expected credit losses within the period have been recognized.

units.source_text: 第三級︰此類金融資產具有客觀減值證據，因此被視為違責或信貸已減值，當中已確認期限內預期信貸損失。
units.translation_target_text: Level 3. These financial assets have objective evidence of impairment and are therefore considered to be in default or credit-impaired, with expected credit losses recognized within the period.
units.translation_en: Level 3. These financial assets have objective evidence of impairment and are therefore considered to be in default or credit-impaired, with expected credit losses recognized within the period.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Level 3. These financial assets have objective evidence of impairment and are therefore considered to be in default or credit-impaired, with expected credit losses recognized within the period.

units.source_text: 購入或承辦信貸已減值之金融資產：按大幅折讓購入或承辦的金融資產，視為反映已產生的信貸損失，當中已確認期限內預期信貸損失。
units.translation_target_text: Financial assets purchased or undertaken with impaired credit: Financial assets purchased or undertaken at a substantial discount are deemed to reflect the credit losses that have occurred, of which expected credit losses within the period have been recognized.
units.translation_en: Financial assets purchased or undertaken with impaired credit: Financial assets purchased or undertaken at a substantial discount are deemed to reflect the credit losses that have occurred, of which expected credit losses within the period have been recognized.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Financial assets purchased or undertaken with impaired credit: Financial assets purchased or undertaken at a substantial discount are deemed to reflect the credit losses that have occurred, of which expected credit losses within the period have been recognized.
